text.title: Index Tuning — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Qdrant 10M HNSW + scalar int8 tuning report.

example.title: index-tuning.yaml for Qdrant 10M
example.code:
workload: read-heavy sla: recall_floor: 0.90 latency_p95_max_ms: 80 memory_cap_gb: 24
hnsw: m: 32 ef_construct: 200 ef_search: 128
quantization: scheme: scalar config: type: int8 quantile: 0.99
bench: baseline: config: {m: 16, ef_search: 16, quantization: none} recall_at_10: 0.84 latency_p95_ms: 38 memory_gb: 41 tuned: recall_at_10: 0.93 latency_p95_ms: 62 memory_gb: 18
tuning_history_path: ops/qdrant/tuning-history.yaml
example.note: Demonstrates baseline (r1), workload-driven M (r3), quantization with recall preserved (r2), full history record (r4), recall lift +0.09 — passes r5 gate.
